name: chart-pie-label-list
visual_summary: A list of labels for a pie chart, often used in data visualizations to display categorical data. It's a great solution when you need to present multiple categories on a chart. Easy to integrate and customize for different chart types.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-pie-label-list
Description: A list of labels for a pie chart, often used in data visualizations to display categorical data. It's a great solution when you need to present multiple categories on a chart. Easy to integrate and customize for different chart types.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: pie chart, data visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
